biography:
Audrina Miranda, born in San Antonio, Texas, has been captivating audiences with her passion for the performing arts since the age of 2. Her journey into the world of acting began when she starred in three independent films, which have been showcased at film festivals nationwide. In 2022, Audrina was honored with the Blue Glass award for Best Achievement by a Young Actor and also won Best Child Actor at the Catalina Film Festival.

Beyond the screen, Audrina has also made her mark in the dance industry. She has worked with some of the industry's top choreographers. Many of her performances have been featured in commercials for major companies and brands around the world.
name: Audrina Miranda
